message:
fix(freeze): use QuickJS JS_IsFunction for typeof_is_function opcode

The freeze codegen was using JSValue.isFunction() which incorrectly
returned true for all objects (checking JS_TAG_OBJECT instead of
properly checking if the object is callable).

Now uses quickjs.JS_IsFunction() which properly checks the object's
class_id to determine if it's a function (bytecode function, proxy
with is_func, or object with call handler).

This fixes RxJS's isFunction() check which was causing SafeSubscriber
to take the wrong code path and not preserve observer callbacks.
